programs.title: The Boarding School Murders
programs.desc: (M) Frankie leaves foster care for an exclusive Swiss boarding school, but the opportunity has a deadly price. When a classmate is murdered, Frankie must fight to uncover the secret.

programs.title: Jingle Belle
programs.desc: (G) A successful jingle writer is cajoled into returning to her hometown to write a song for the 50th anniversary of the annual Christmas Eve concert.
